playground.title: Monday Rover (Raspberry Pi)
playground.cardDescription: Raspberry Pi robotics exploration with computer vision in the loop.
playground.description:
Monday Rover is a small robotics exploration project built to iterate quickly on perception + control loops.

  • Computer vision-assisted behaviors (prototype stage)
  • Hardware bring-up, sensor/actuator integration, and debugging on-device
  • Emphasis on tight feedback cycles and observability while experimenting

playground.title: Generative Video Platform
playground.cardDescription: Exploring generative AI for video workflows, from UX to pipeline shape.
playground.description:
Generative Video Platform (GVP) explores how generative systems fit into real video workflows—where latency, repeatability, and UX matter.

  • Product-shaped prototyping: iterate on UI, prompts, and outputs together
  • Pipeline thinking: inputs → generation → review → publish
  • Focus on composability and clear system boundaries as it evolves

portfolio.title: Apptio (an IBM company)
portfolio.cardDescription: Enterprise TBM / IT financial management SaaS — data-intensive, customer-critical.
portfolio.description:
Apptio (IBM) is an enterprise TBM / IT financial management platform used for planning, allocation, and cost transparency.

  • Data-intensive SaaS with strong correctness, reliability, and scale requirements
  • Work spans platform concerns and end-to-end delivery across services
  • Focus on keeping systems operable: debuggability, predictable change, and clear ownership

portfolio.title: Jumpcloud
portfolio.cardDescription: Cloud directory + device management — identity and access at org scale.
portfolio.description:
JumpCloud provides cloud directory and device management for distributed organizations.

  • Identity/device surface area where security and reliability are non-negotiable
  • APIs and integrations shaped for operational correctness
  • Emphasis on safe delivery: guardrails, incremental rollouts, and clear failure modes

portfolio.title: Instant Ink (HP)
portfolio.cardDescription: Subscription commerce + fulfillment systems for high-volume consumer services.
portfolio.description:
Instant Ink (HP) is a subscription service that automates replenishment and fulfillment workflows at scale.

  • High-volume systems where idempotency and operational resilience matter
  • Cross-cutting concerns: user experience, backend reliability, and business workflows
  • Focus on reducing toil and raising signal in production operations

portfolio.title: AT&T
portfolio.cardDescription: TQL: a SQL-like query language for ticket search and operational analytics.
portfolio.description:
AT&T — built TQL, a SQL-like domain language for querying operational tickets.

  • Focused on expressiveness, performance characteristics, and predictable semantics
  • Designed for real operational workflows: search, filters, and analytics
  • Emphasis on maintainability: clear grammar, tests, and debuggable execution

portfolio.title: Master's in Computer Science
portfolio.cardDescription: M.S. CS focus: machine learning, data science, and software engineering practice.
portfolio.description:
Master's in Computer Science (MIU) with focus on applied ML, data science, and disciplined software delivery.

  • Machine learning and data science foundations
  • Algorithmic thinking and engineering rigor
  • Emphasis on SDLC and high-quality implementation habits

portfolio.title: Sunrise Resorts & Cruises
portfolio.cardDescription: Infra + ops: datacenters, VPN/networking, and internal tooling.
portfolio.description:
Sunrise Resorts & Cruises — infrastructure and operations work with real-world constraints.

  • Datacenter and network/VPN work supporting business-critical operations
  • Internal tools for asset and operational management
  • Bias toward reliability, security, and pragmatic automation

portfolio.title: Campus Party Milenio (Spain)
portfolio.cardDescription: Community + collaboration: technical exchange with an international builder community.
portfolio.description:
Campus Party Milenio (Spain) — collaboration and knowledge-sharing with an international technical community.

  • Worked alongside builders across emerging technologies
  • Hands-on experimentation and peer feedback loops
  • Strong bias for shipping and learning in public

portfolio.title: 5d-agency (SWI)
portfolio.cardDescription: Client delivery across web/mobile, AR, and Unity-powered experiences.
portfolio.description:
5d-agency (SWI) — shipped products across web, mobile, and interactive experiences.

  • Unity + web/mobile delivery in client-facing timelines
  • AR and interactive experiences with product constraints
  • Pragmatic engineering: ship, learn, stabilize, and iterate

portfolio.title: Early Startups
portfolio.cardDescription: Early-stage work across web apps, embedded Linux, and research tooling.
portfolio.description:
Early startups — a mix of hands-on engineering across domains.

  • DDA Advertising: advertising tech and web systems
  • OIG OS: Linux-based embedded systems
  • QREO: web applications and research-oriented tooling
